exam_name: Microsoft Security, Compliance, and Identity Fundamentals

testing_centers.notes: Available at Certiport Authorized Testing Centers (primarily academic)

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name on ID must match registration. For online: webcam required, room must be clear of people and materials.
exam_rules: No notes, books, or study materials. No phones or smartwatches. Whiteboard or scratch paper may be provided by testing center. Online: no dual monitors, no virtual machines, no headphones, must be alone in a closed room.
renewal_options: Microsoft certifications (Associate/Expert/Specialty) are renewed annually for free via a short renewal assessment on Microsoft Learn. Renewal assessment available 6 months before expiry. Fundamentals certifications do not expire.
target_audience: Business stakeholder, New or existing IT professional, Student
recommended_experience: Familiar with Microsoft Azure and Microsoft 365 and want to understand how Microsoft SCI solutions can span across these solution areas to provide a holistic and end-to-end solution.

retake_policy.notes: No waiting period for first retake if score >= 500 on failed attempt. If score < 500: 14-day waiting period before retake. Maximum 5 attempts per exam per year (365 days). Free retake voucher sometimes included in official instructor-led training.

domains.name: Describe the concepts of security, compliance, and identity

objectives.title: Describe security and compliance concepts
sub_objectives: Describe Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) concepts

objectives.title: Define identity concepts
sub_objectives: Define identity as the primary security perimeter
Describe the concept of directory services and Active Directory

domains.name: Describe the capabilities of Microsoft Entra

objectives.title: Describe function and identity types of Microsoft Entra ID
Describe authentication capabilities of Microsoft Entra ID
sub_objectives: Describe password protection and management capabilities

objectives.title: Describe access management capabilities of Microsoft Entra ID
sub_objectives: Describe Microsoft Entra roles and role-based access control (RBAC)
Describe identity protection and governance capabilities of Microsoft Entra
Describe the capabilities of Microsoft Entra Privileged Identity Management

domains.name: Describe the capabilities of Microsoft security solutions

objectives.title: Describe core infrastructure security services in Azure
sub_objectives: Describe network segmentation with Azure virtual networks

objectives.title: Describe security management capabilities of Azure
sub_objectives: Describe how security policies, standards, and recommendations improve the cloud security posture
Describe enhanced security features provided by cloud workload protection

objectives.title: Describe capabilities of Microsoft Sentinel
sub_objectives: Define the concepts of security information and event management (SIEM) and security orchestration automated response (SOAR)
Describe threat detection and mitigation capabilities in Microsoft Sentinel
Describe threat protection with Microsoft Defender XDR
Describe Microsoft Defender for Cloud Apps
Describe Microsoft Defender Threat Intelligence (Defender TI)

domains.name: Describe the capabilities of Microsoft compliance solutions

objectives.title: Describe Microsoft Service Trust Portal and privacy principles
sub_objectives: Describe the Service Trust Portal offerings
Describe the privacy principles of Microsoft

objectives.title: Describe compliance management capabilities of Microsoft Purview
sub_objectives: Describe the uses and benefits of compliance score

objectives.title: Describe information protection, data lifecycle management, and data governance capabilities of Microsoft Purview
sub_objectives: Describe the benefits of Content explorer and Activity explorer
Describe sensitivity labels and sensitivity label policies
Describe retention policies, retention labels, and retention label policies

objectives.title: Describe insider risk, eDiscovery, and audit capabilities in Microsoft Purview
sub_objectives: Describe eDiscovery solutions in Microsoft Purview
Describe audit solutions in Microsoft Purview

official_study_resources.title: Microsoft Learn (free self-paced training)
official_study_resources.notes: Free official learning paths mapped to each exam

official_study_resources.title: Microsoft Official Practice Assessment
official_study_resources.notes: Free official practice questions on Microsoft Learn

aliases: microsoft security compliance and identity fundamentals
